case_title: ANTONIO DEL CASTILLO VS. GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-08-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-08-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ANTONIO DE CASRILLO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY JOANNA LUKAS, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEL CASTILLO, ANTONIO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY DEL CASTILLO, ANTONIO AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION RE: AMENDMENT OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TO MORE PRECISELY BREAK DOWN COSTS CLAIMED FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEL CASTILLO, ANTONIO
